"I mean, I don't want to brag or nothing, but I got
some moves."

data.flavor_text:
The Lorcana Hide-and-Seek Championship was
hers for the taking.

keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

"Let's find some nice twigs, eh? I could use a
snack!"

abilities.text: While this character is exerted, your characters named Koda can't be challenged.

data.flavor_text:
"You have to look after your little brother, no matter
how big a pain he is."
—Kenai

"Look, the code may say I'm a princess, but I know
who I really am...."

data.flavor_text: "I'd love a snack, but I'm kinda tied up right now."

cake ever!"

sugar in it."

abilities.name: Parade Order

abilities.name: Big Prize
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, each opponent reveals the top card of their deck. If it's a character card, they may put it into their hand. Otherwise, they put it on the bottom of their deck.

data.name: Fix-It Felix, Jr.

abilities.name: Oh, My Land!

data.flavor_text:
"I don't think I've ever seen anything as sweet as
this."

data.flavor_text:
"Investigate every part of the Illuminary, find the
chromicons, restore the Illuminary, how hard can
it—wait, what was that noise?"

friends that we call ‘Martin and the Flood.’"

data.name: Try Everything
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Remove up to 3 damage from chosen character and ready them. They can't quest or challenge for the rest of this turn.
data.flavor_text: I want to try even though I could fail

"The heart is not so easily changed, but the head can
be persuaded."
—Grand Pabbie

rules: Play a character with cost 5 or less from your discard for free.
data.flavor_text: Not all that is lost is gone forever.

Name a card. Return all character cards with that name from your discard to your hand.

data.name: Invited to the Ball
rules: Reveal the top 2 cards of your deck. Put revealed character cards into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

rules: Banish chosen character of yours to banish chosen character.
data.flavor_text:
Hades: "Listen, kid. If I'm gettin' banished back to the
lorebook, you're going with me."
Hercules: "We'll see about that."

data.name: Who's With Me?
rules: Your characters get +2 {Strength} this turn. Whenever one of your characters with Reckless challenges another character this turn, gain 2 lore.
data.flavor_text: "Don't forget, the purple unicorn is mine!"

data.name: Potion of Might

abilities.name: Vile Concoction
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gets +3 {Strength} this turn. If a Villain character is chosen, they get +4 {Strength} instead.

data.source: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

abilities.name: Power Appointed
abilities.text: At the start of your turn, if you have a character in play with more {Strength} than each opposing character in play, each opponent loses 1 lore and you gain lore equal to the lore lost.

data.name: Ludwig Von Drake
data.flavor_text:
"So you see, there's a dark void at the edge of
Lorcana. A complete absence of electromagnetic
radiation! What's it made of? I don't know! The
light's just gone. Kaput!"

data.name: Vision of the Future
rules: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
data.flavor_text:
"We must repair the Illuminary before it's too late. And
we'll need these devices, these chromicons, to fix it."

rules: Banish any number of your items, then draw a card for each item banished this way.
data.flavor_text: "I am King! King! King!"

As the sun will rise
